## NullableBool enumerasi

Mewakili nilai boolean tiga nilai.

```csharp
public enum NullableBool : sbyte
```

### Nilai

| Nama | Nilai | Deskripsi |
| --- | --- | --- |
| NotDefined | `-1` | Nilai boolean tidak terdefinisi. |
| False | `0` | Nilai False. |
| True | `1` | Nilai True. |
